original_image_tags: A single, typewritten page on dark paper with two hole-punch marks at the top. The word "CONFIDENTIAL" is stamped at the top center and bottom center. The word "COPY" is stamped diagonally in the top right corner. The document is an affidavit.

elements.description: A typed document labeled 'AFFIDAVIT' regarding a sighting of two flying disc or saucer shaped silver colored objects. The page features typed text and is marked 'CONFIDENTIAL' at the top and bottom, and 'COPY' in the upper right corner. There are two hole-punch marks near the top.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of stamps ('CONFIDENTIAL', 'COPY'), hole punches, and document type ('AFFIDAVIT'), but B adds specific subject details about 'flying disc or saucer shaped silver colored objects' not mentioned in A.
